name: Taco Take-Out Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Pack beef into an ungreased 10-inch skillet on medium heat.
2. Cover and let simmer, reducing to low heat after 5 minutes.
3. Allow the beef to steam until moist and combined with natural fat, creating a broth (12-15 minutes).
4. Turn off heat and drain liquid from beef into a blender.
5. Blend this mixture until it resembles a mortar.
6. Add onion, green pepper, mustard seeds, bouillon powder, chili powder, Tabasco sauce, cumin powder, chili sauce, sweet pickle relish, tomato paste, water, and molasses to the pulverized beef.
7. Stir in beef broth.
8. Simmer uncovered, stirring frequently, or use a slow cooker on "high" for about 2 hours.
9. If needed, simmer an additional hour on the range, adding liquid to maintain sauce consistency.
10. Spoon into fried taco shells and top with lettuce, grated cheese, and Taco 5 Alarm Sauce.
